text_raw: You alone flow, while all else remains still.
text_clean: You alone flow, while all else remains still.

text_raw: You can finally hear me...
text_clean: You can finally hear me...

text_raw: One with words meant for your ears.
text_clean: One with words meant for your ears.

text_raw: It matters not.
text_clean: It matters not.

text_raw: Come, find me.
text_clean: Come, find me.

text_raw: What is important...
text_clean: What is important...

text_raw: is the path you've walked, and the one still ahead.
text_clean: is the path you've walked, and the one still ahead.

text_raw: To save others, one must first find strength within.
text_clean: To save others, one must first find strength within.

text_raw: Wounds open the heart in ways words never could.
text_clean: Wounds open the heart in ways words never could.

text_raw: You're awake? What exactly do you think you were doing? Did you even have a plan?
text_clean: You're awake? What exactly do you think you were doing? Did you even have a plan?

text_raw: If not for the witch sisters, you'd have been in big trouble, you know?
text_clean: If not for the witch sisters, you'd have been in big trouble, you know?

text_raw: Ooooh, he's awake now...!
text_clean: Ooooh, he's awake now...!

text_raw: Something feels funny... Nah, must be nothing.
text_clean: Something feels funny... Nah, must be nothing.

text_raw: This is him, isn't it?
text_clean: This is him, isn't it?

text_raw: Looks like he's all better!
text_clean: Looks like he's all better!

text_raw: Hehehe. Catch me if you can! Hahaha!
text_clean: Hehehe. Catch me if you can! Hahaha!

text_raw: See? I told you he'd wake up!
text_clean: See? I told you he'd wake up!

text_raw: Come on, come get me! Hehehe... Oh, this is so much fun.
text_clean: Come on, come get me! Hehehe... Oh, this is so much fun.

text_raw: Wooooow...
text_clean: Wooooow...

text_raw: Huh? What are you doing there?
text_clean: Huh? What are you doing there?

text_raw: When will anyone ever listen to me...
text_clean: When will anyone ever listen to me...

text_raw: You leaving already? You need more rest!
text_clean: You leaving already? You need more rest!

text_raw: You're safe here, so just rest. I mean it, don't even think!
text_clean: You're safe here, so just rest. I mean it, don't even think!

text_raw: Oh! Let's put flowers on the kitty's head!
text_clean: Oh! Let's put flowers on the kitty's head!

text_raw: Heeheehee! That looks fun! Let me play, or I'll pout!
text_clean: Heeheehee! That looks fun! Let me play, or I'll pout!

text_raw: I had another game in mind... but that sounds fun too! Hahaha!
text_clean: I had another game in mind... but that sounds fun too! Hahaha!

text_raw: Come on then, let's be off!
text_clean: Come on then, let's be off!

text_raw: Hmm.
text_clean: Hmm.

text_raw: I feel revitalized.
text_clean: I feel revitalized.

text_raw: This will do. I have places I must go...
text_clean: This will do. I have places I must go...

text_raw: Please let my comrades know.
text_clean: Please let my comrades know.

text_raw: You've been watching me?
text_clean: You've been watching me?

text_raw: Who are you?
text_clean: Who are you?

text_raw: You're... different from the other witches.
text_clean: You're... different from the other witches.

text_raw: This world is more vast than you could ever imagine.
text_clean: This world is more vast than you could ever imagine.

text_raw: And witches dwell in even the farthest reaches.
text_clean: And witches dwell in even the farthest reaches.

text_raw: Each keeps her place, tending the balance in her own way.
text_clean: Each keeps her place, tending the balance in her own way.

text_raw: Then why are you...
text_clean: Then why are you...

text_raw: In Pywel, so far from our posts?
text_clean: In Pywel, so far from our posts?

text_raw: We heard the witches here wield arts unknown to us.
text_clean: We heard the witches here wield arts unknown to us.

text_raw: Maintaining the balance is no small task,
text_clean: Maintaining the balance is no small task,

text_raw: so honing our craft, wherever we must, is vital.
text_clean: so honing our craft, wherever we must, is vital.

text_raw: Learning new things, wandering new lands... it's hardly a burden.
text_clean: Learning new things, wandering new lands... it's hardly a burden.

text_raw: You're in good health.
text_clean: You're in good health.

text_raw: A voice?
text_clean: A voice?

text_raw: The trial ahead will not be gentle.
text_clean: The trial ahead will not be gentle.

text_raw: But our powers can have you there in an instant.
text_clean: But our powers can have you there in an instant.

text_raw: It's a path only you can walk.
text_clean: It's a path only you can walk.

text_raw: We merely repaid a kindness.
text_clean: We merely repaid a kindness.

text_raw: Oh?
text_clean: Oh?

text_raw: It is a call to prove yourself through trial.
text_clean: It is a call to prove yourself through trial.

text_raw: Beyond this point lies the Crimson Desert.
text_clean: Beyond this point lies the Crimson Desert.

text_raw: The one who called you waits past its sands.
text_clean: The one who called you waits past its sands.

text_raw: This is as far as we go.
text_clean: This is as far as we go.

text_raw: You'll overcome it. I've no doubt.
text_clean: You'll overcome it. I've no doubt.

text_raw: The place you seek lies far from here...
text_clean: The place you seek lies far from here...

text_raw: I'm told you saved my life. I owe you both.
text_clean: I'm told you saved my life. I owe you both.

text_raw: When I woke, I heard a voice.
text_clean: When I woke, I heard a voice.

text_raw: It said to seek it out to "find strength within."
text_clean: It said to seek it out to "find strength within."

text_raw: Thank you.
text_clean: Thank you.

text_raw: Step forward, if you are prepared to face the truth.
text_clean: Step forward, if you are prepared to face the truth.

text_raw: To restore the natural order, great strength is required.
text_clean: To restore the natural order, great strength is required.

text_raw: Truth lies hidden in a single breath that pierces one's inner darkness—find that breath.
text_clean: Truth lies hidden in a single breath that pierces one's inner darkness—find that breath.

text_raw: Listen closely to the cries of suffering that surround you.
text_clean: Listen closely to the cries of suffering that surround you.

text_raw:
Close your eyes and step into the dark.
When the mind falls silent, your blade and soul shall be one.
text_clean:
Close your eyes and step into the dark.
When the mind falls silent, your blade and soul shall be one.

text_raw: Restore the balance. Let the order of the world settle in your grasp.
text_clean: Restore the balance. Let the order of the world settle in your grasp.

text_raw: Unravel the secrets carved into ancient stone and let their power flow through you.
text_clean: Unravel the secrets carved into ancient stone and let their power flow through you.

text_raw: Fan the flames within your heart, boil your blood to the final drop.
text_clean: Fan the flames within your heart, boil your blood to the final drop.

text_raw: Let the starlight of your soul sink into the still sea of will.
text_clean: Let the starlight of your soul sink into the still sea of will.

text_raw: Walk the unending road, unwavering in resolve.
text_clean: Walk the unending road, unwavering in resolve.

text_raw: So, you're finally here.
text_clean: So, you're finally here.

text_raw: Our steps have always followed the same current.
text_clean: Our steps have always followed the same current.

text_raw: I've watched your every choice unfold.
text_clean: I've watched your every choice unfold.

text_raw: You wield sword and skill, yet lack the experience to unite them.
text_clean: You wield sword and skill, yet lack the experience to unite them.

text_raw: So I will help you choose the path you must walk.
text_clean: So I will help you choose the path you must walk.

text_raw: Come. Show me the strength you truly possess.
text_clean: Come. Show me the strength you truly possess.

text_raw: Your steel and skill have become one in this moment.
text_clean: Your steel and skill have become one in this moment.

text_raw: Now a new era dawns.
text_clean: Now a new era dawns.

text_raw: Despite the weight you've carried, and how heavy those burdens were...
text_clean: Despite the weight you've carried, and how heavy those burdens were...

text_raw: Despite enduring so much in silence... you must have been lonely.
text_clean: Despite enduring so much in silence... you must have been lonely.

text_raw: And yet, you never stopped moving forward.
text_clean: And yet, you never stopped moving forward.

text_raw: You were never wrong.
text_clean: You were never wrong.

text_raw: Every path you chose, was the right one.
text_clean: Every path you chose, was the right one.

text_raw: So no matter what comes, never lose yourself.
text_clean: So no matter what comes, never lose yourself.

text_raw: Our blades bear the weight of failure and regret.
text_clean: Our blades bear the weight of failure and regret.

text_raw: My greatest failing was being blind to all but what lay before me.
text_clean: My greatest failing was being blind to all but what lay before me.

text_raw: That is why our blades must stay true.
text_clean: That is why our blades must stay true.

text_raw: Strike.
text_clean: Strike.

text_raw: Not through sight,
text_clean: Not through sight,

text_raw: but through insight.
text_clean: but through insight.

text_raw: You were expecting me?
text_clean: You were expecting me?

text_raw: Thank you for your guidance.
text_clean: Thank you for your guidance.

text_raw: Creature born from the Abyss's depths! Your hour has come! Succumb to the darkness!
text_clean: Creature born from the Abyss's depths! Your hour has come! Succumb to the darkness!

text_raw: N..no... just a little more darkness...
text_clean: N..no... just a little more darkness...

text_raw: Stop him!
text_clean: Stop him!

text_raw: In the middle of a line.
text_clean: In the middle of a line.

text_raw: Who would build a temple in a place like this...
text_clean: Who would build a temple in a place like this...

text_raw: A sword unrefined, yet honing its edge.
text_clean: A sword unrefined, yet honing its edge.

text_raw: Let's see how your trials have tempered your blade.
text_clean: Let's see how your trials have tempered your blade.

text_raw: You assume the stance of a student. Engage me!
text_clean: You assume the stance of a student. Engage me!

text_raw: Here I am.
text_clean: Here I am.

text_raw: As expected.
text_clean: As expected.

text_raw: Take that as you will.
text_clean: Take that as you will.

text_raw: A sword is not swung with strength alone. Your heart must guide it.
text_clean: A sword is not swung with strength alone. Your heart must guide it.

text_raw: Recall what your trials have already taught you.
text_clean: Recall what your trials have already taught you.

text_raw: Wild swings never find their mark.
text_clean: Wild swings never find their mark.

text_raw: Let your skill flow through your sword!
text_clean: Let your skill flow through your sword!

text_raw: The blade you watch for finds you first!
text_clean: The blade you watch for finds you first!

text_raw: Still chasing what you see with your eyes?
text_clean: Still chasing what you see with your eyes?

text_raw: Seek only what is tangible, and you lose sight of the truth.
text_clean: Seek only what is tangible, and you lose sight of the truth.

text_raw: To see your true enemy,
text_clean: To see your true enemy,

text_raw: observe essence beyond form.
text_clean: observe essence beyond form.

text_raw: So, you've begun to feel it at last.
text_clean: So, you've begun to feel it at last.

text_raw: This meeting may seem like chance, yet our fate was woven long ago.
text_clean: This meeting may seem like chance, yet our fate was woven long ago.

text_raw: Past and future are one, a present kindness is the seed of tomorrow's salvation.
text_clean: Past and future are one, a present kindness is the seed of tomorrow's salvation.

text_raw: The defeats of yesterday will grant you the wisdom to shape your tomorrow,
text_clean: The defeats of yesterday will grant you the wisdom to shape your tomorrow,

text_raw: In the end, all things are fated to flow back together.
text_clean: In the end, all things are fated to flow back together.

text_raw: Follow me.
text_clean: Follow me.

text_raw: It's been a harsh journey... yet you've made it.
text_clean: It's been a harsh journey... yet you've made it.

text_raw: so keep these words close to your heart.
text_clean: so keep these words close to your heart.

text_raw: I won't hold back. Understand?
text_clean: I won't hold back. Understand?

text_raw: You...!
text_clean: You...!

text_raw: Fort Musket...
text_clean: Fort Musket...

text_raw: They've sealed themselves within,
text_clean: They've sealed themselves within,

text_raw: Unfortunately, any who have had a taste of its power...
text_clean: Unfortunately, any who have had a taste of its power...

text_raw: ...become a slave to it, always yearning for more.
text_clean: ...become a slave to it, always yearning for more.

text_raw: To such people, balance and peace are nothing but illusions.
text_clean: To such people, balance and peace are nothing but illusions.

text_raw: The Abyss holds what power the world itself cannot contain.
text_clean: The Abyss holds what power the world itself cannot contain.

text_clean: If it collapses, reality will collapse with it.

text_clean: I'm certain you've seen it yourself.

text_raw: The shards of power shed by the Abyss...
text_clean: The shards of power shed by the Abyss...

text_raw: ...and the horrors committed by those who wield those artifacts.
text_clean: ...and the horrors committed by those who wield those artifacts.

text_raw: They are no longer content with those crumbs.
text_clean: They are no longer content with those crumbs.

text_raw: What do you know of the Abyss?
text_clean: What do you know of the Abyss?

text_raw: The Abyss and reality cannot be separated. They are one and the same.
text_clean: The Abyss and reality cannot be separated. They are one and the same.

text_raw: scheming to force open the gate.
text_clean: scheming to force open the gate.

text_clean: Which is why they plot to open the gate.

text_raw: Even if it dooms us all.
text_clean: Even if it dooms us all.

text_raw: That gate must never open.
text_clean: That gate must never open.

text_raw: Pure power. Raw and untamed.
text_clean: Pure power. Raw and untamed.

text_raw: The moment it's claimed by a single hand, ruin is sure to follow.
text_clean: The moment it's claimed by a single hand, ruin is sure to follow.

text_raw: You alone cannot stop them.
text_clean: You alone cannot stop them.
